title: Man pages: refactor common options (continued)
body:
Yet more common options moved into the include mechanism.

Bug fix and changes to the preprocess script:
 - big oops, I was not handling '<<something pod|something>>'
   where 'pod' appears other than the beginning of the string.
 - I was also not handling 'container<<| or pod>>', where one
   side was empty.
 - executive decision: <<subcommand>>, on podman-pod-foo,
   becomes just 'foo' (not 'pod foo').

Add tests for all.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
Yet more man page refactoring
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
A lot of judgment here. I really don't know what to suggest for reviewing. Sorry.

PR timing for posterity
| type | distro       | user     |    local |   remote | container |
| ---- | --------     | ----     |    ----: |   -----: | --------: |
| int  | fedora-36    | root     |    29:44 |    48:40 |     29:19 |
| int  | ubuntu-2204  | root     |    31:07 |    49:07 |
| int  | fedora-36    | rootless |    30:23 |          |
| int  | ubuntu-2204  | rootless |    32:11 |          |
| sys  | fedora-36    | root     |    29:33 |    28:09 |
| sys  | fedora-36-aarch64 | root     |    31:37 |    18:12 |
| sys  | ubuntu-2204  | root     |    26:47 |    19:22 |
| sys  | fedora-36    | rootless |    28:30 |    24:55 |
| sys  | ubuntu-2204  | rootless |    25:03 |          |
| bud  | fedora-36    | root     |    25:29 |    25:27 |
Too much? Should I break this down into smaller chunks?

This is fine, but I think if you had just picked out big changes with a single option, it would be easier to review.  Or break them into multiple PRs.
For example removing --authfile into a options/authfile.go and all of the man pages to use it, as a single PR.

LGTM
(Note that this will be about 120 separate PRs)
